openings: A charming piece of modern songwriting
A cinematic track with a strong identity
A compact song with a memorable hook
A moody release with a clear sense of direction
endings: that could easily fit into a modern playlist.
that feels both familiar and fresh.
that sounds ready for late-night radio.
that would work well in a live set.
that feels carefully arranged without sounding overproduced.
that leaves a clean and memorable aftertaste.
that makes a strong impression in less than four minutes.
that sounds like the beginning of a promising album cycle.

openings: I found your shadow in the morning light
We drove all night through the silent rain
The city was glowing like a broken sign
I heard your voice on an empty train
We left our names on the bedroom wall
middles: and every heartbeat sounded out of time
while the radio played our favorite line
but the summer kept slipping away
with a little more hope than yesterday
like a secret that nobody could keep
choruses: Come back, come back, to the neon night
Run fast, run free, through the open sky
Stay close, stay close, till the morning light
Sing loud, sing loud, while the world goes by
endings: and I still remember the sound
with our feet above the ground
